textByHash.09b359ffdd4fdbe449960585a18a69abbb9ec617: Why, naturally, that's no problem for someone with such a keen interest in expanding his knowledge!
textByHash.1425cdbed95c64445708199b45c251eb0cd58e05: That's splendid, keep going and you'll find them all, I'm sure!
textByHash.145ac4b025ffe4bd69cbbf23675dbb9353f40fee: You're awfully tall for a dwarf, you know. And a rock you say? I suppose I know a fair bit about rocks, yes.
textByHash.17e66c9ef71cc7a2bc43d5410ce303d49edeabd4: Can you leave me alone please? I'm trying to study.
textByHash.255d23bb590a833709f8c5332d4a1e31bcd064cc: Well, good for him, never did like humans anyway.
textByHash.2880ff30d65c6e84eeba381482da1e3a72d1afaf: A human, you say? Are we using humans as cannon fodder now?
textByHash.30831af8309fe75bc348577fe31d17b5fa033774: Why, naturally, that's no problem for someone with such a keen interest in expanding her knowledge!
textByHash.33147f3916a65d7e03b36b909d0eab95ddbe2036: Sorry, no... I do not even remember what I drew them on.
textByHash.3a3d1c6eed3db0ffc1243f52873673d3e35b9a08: No no, I never go there, I'm not a member you know. But I sometimes go down to the regular mines to study the conditions of the working dwarf.
textByHash.3c050794e6c78edb519491763e1ac717ed1f4f94: Oh dear, I seem to have lost the schematics.
textByHash.4197856ef0b661e638d8b641783bd17710262689: I seem to have misplaced the pages... a pity, I had wanted to study them some more. Oh well...
textByHash.51d9b277d0d27980ad8d6f8abbe09f4265586208: Well, as a matter of fact, I picked up an interesting book on one of my travels, from a quite out of the way dwarven outpost.
textByHash.65a965d63cfd4895a7e0c5456e5cdfde52ed0749: Lucky that I have another copy, isn't it? Please don't lose it again.
textByHash.6ffecd240c9f43ae5f53a819dcbe94742b1f79de: Of course, anything to help a fellow dwarf, especially such a big, strong one such as yourself!
textByHash.7514db6cacdad6e584d6ef595f3cf9c80bcf47ea: How are you getting on with finding those missing pages?
textByHash.752d8795f30d1a59b3e6aad08fc4433fbcbc963d: I probably lost them in the mines below. I don't have them up here in any case.
textByHash.78420b5df6f4bfd7872565f667418e4980a70a63: I'm not entirely sure, but it seems to describe this very rock, and how it came to be placed in that cavern. I tore out the most interesting pages for more detailed perusal. Let me get them for you.
textByHash.8e28d00810b8cbffacaa054510a021510eadcac9: Oh, well, if it's that important to you, perhaps you can go and look for the pages? There should be three of them.
textByHash.92eaaa43f84e970d513d827982d77fd9d264892c: Oh yes, quite right... let me see them, please, and I'll put the book back together for you.
textByHash.94b8472fcf4859cd2ce70618e3f09d0d2bd2c005: Well, of course, I have the schematics written down on a piece of paper somewhere. Let me just look for it.
textByHash.9bae60afc718463618d5619b2d08fb886fc6b908: Down in the mines below, that'd be my best bet. I don't know where though, they could be anywhere down there.
textByHash.9fc7cb52c137782cff0c28df5255d884c306434e: Well, here, I happened to have a copy of it. Try not to lose it this time!
textByHash.afb85acc1707c5c624917d17e849f71c88445cc6: Oh, I see, I see. No, I have no schematics to... what did you say? Modify the cannon to shoot humans? Such a preposterous idea.
textByHash.b7d625730ba2291938a058a78d7dcfaecb75076b: Now, you wouldn't be able to go and look for the schematics, would you?
textByHash.c74354f1df69960fd1a13d4e403d0c6e5092ee9e: Oh, hello... do I know you?
textByHash.c96bffe5eaeb5de5b4b20d29f00453843ad5e2c0: I suppose I just forgot that I had one.
textByHash.c97165772e5db0cde5c5cfa1400699923004a951: Oh, old Dondakan, sure I know him. And I know his rock too. It's that unbreakable one, isn't it?
textByHash.ccc4174b00e543f55c24dd0107e032952ddb634e: Why, yes, I think so... who's asking?
textByHash.d1de2f705abf8562d99677fe96cf5e771917eded: Oh yes, have you read it yet?
textByHash.d5adafd5a26b0d146e8c71d0c89a4e1cb9cda0f8: Why, naturally, that's no problem for someone with such a keen interest in expanding their knowledge!
textByHash.d64777c7e6a179eb2e7b02a16849062f1efe0024: Marvelous! I'm sure it's only a matter of time before you find the final page!
textByHash.e0e9f93dcb66c290719dc9cd4a7529c22e14e5cc: Oh, of course, why didn't I think of that!
textByHash.e2869555a9a665529e0e289414b7ffd9ce6480a3: Splendid, now, there's a good dwarf!
textByHash.e4c81be01a69c85ff583d94d5e3a876c55532552: I hardly ever lose anything, I'll have you know!
textByHash.ed63c3a10eb2e309f9655de9ab9b0f7d97bfe03b: There you go... You will give it back when you've finished with it, won't you? I'd really like to study it in more detail some time.
textByHash.ede4f6f9a982d9d6be17c2310c57965dca310d95: That's terrible! Have you even read it yet?
textByHash.f6c30306827cacdc09d5210883a3de5dff26195c: No, all I have are the base schematics of the cannon. I was on the multicannon project once, you know?
textByHash.f825f6140c6953555d4b52008f3827997ead2f3e: Don't tell me you lost that book!
textByHash.fe02efd9b199f11452270d5ecbfcb69405e9553e: Oh, let's see... well... maybe. I'm not altogether sure where I left them.
